stories.headline: Families fleeing Israeli attacks take refuge in Lebanon’s mountains
stories.description: Over one million people displaced across Lebanon as Israel escalates military campaign with air raids, ground invasion.

stories.headline: Yemen’s civilians fear fallout after Houthis enter Iran war
stories.description: Fears of air strikes and rising prices dominate everyday life in Sanaa as Yemen becomes embroiled in regional conflict.

stories.headline: Trump says US armed Iranian dissidents via Kurds, Kurdish groups deny claim
stories.description: Trump’s admission gives credence to Iranian assertion that the January protests were backed by the West to create chaos.

stories.headline: A visual guide to Artemis II and previous missions to the moon
stories.description: Artemis II is expected to break the record for the farthest distance humans have travelled from Earth.

stories.headline: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed
stories.description: Tehran says it will respond ‘in kind’ to attacks on its infrastructure, accuses Trump of inciting ‘war crimes’.
